name: master e2e: real-time sockets and messaging flow through the entry
command:
cat > profile.json <<'JEOF'
{"schema_version":"1.0","complete":true,"unanswered":[],"answers":{"workload":"a public patient-facing telehealth platform","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"hipaa","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"analytics","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"public","data_cadence":"real-time"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" --vision "public telehealth platform" --profile profile.json --out-dir sess --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("sess/technical-requirements.json","utf8"));const P=p=>(j.pillars[p]||[]).map(c=>c.concern);const has=(p,c)=>P(p).includes(c);const groups=Object.keys(j.pillars).filter(p=>(j.pillars[p]||[]).length>0);process.exit(has("realtime","websocket_gateway")&&has("realtime","connection_auth")&&has("integration","message_queue")&&has("integration","dead_letter_queue")?0:1)' && echo realtime-messaging 1>&2
